name: Pipe Flow Calculator
description: Industrial-grade pipe flow analysis tool based on Darcy-Weisbach, Bernoulli, and empirical friction factor correlations. Compliant with ISO 5167, ASME MFC, and Six Sigma measurement system analysis principles.

inputs.label: Pipe Inner Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Nominal pipe diameter per ISO 6708. Affects cross-sectional area and velocity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal pipe diameter per ISO 6708. Affects cross-sectional area and velocity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 6708'e göre nominal boru çapı. Kesit alanını ve hızı etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Nennrohrdurchmesser nach ISO 6708. Beeinflusst Querschnittsfläche und Geschwindigkeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre nominal du tuyau selon ISO 6708. Affecte la section transversale et la vitesse.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro nominal de tubería según ISO 6708. Afecta el área transversal y la velocidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: القطر الاسمي للأنبوب وفقًا لـ ISO 6708. يؤثر على مساحة المقطع العرضي والسرعة.

inputs.label: Pipe Length
inputs.businessContext: Total straight pipe length. Used for friction loss calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total straight pipe length. Used for friction loss calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam düz boru uzunluğu. Sürtünme kaybı hesaplamasında kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtlänge des geraden Rohrs. Wird für die Berechnung des Reibungsverlusts verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur totale de tuyau droit. Utilisée pour le calcul des pertes par frottement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud total de tubería recta. Se utiliza para el cálculo de pérdida por fricción.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الطول الإجمالي للأنبوب المستقيم. يُستخدم لحساب فقد الاحتكاك.

inputs.label: Volumetric Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Design flow rate. Must be within pump capacity and pipe rating.

businessContext_i18n.en: Design flow rate. Must be within pump capacity and pipe rating.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tasarım debisi. Pompa kapasitesi ve boru değeri dahilinde olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Auslegungsdurchfluss. Muss innerhalb der Pumpenkapazität und Rohrnennweite liegen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Débit de conception. Doit être dans la capacité de la pompe et la plage nominale du tuyau.
businessContext_i18n.es: Caudal de diseño. Debe estar dentro de la capacidad de la bomba y la clasificación de la tubería.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل التدفق التصميمي. يجب أن يكون ضمن سعة المضخة وتصنيف الأنبوب.

inputs.label: Fluid Density
inputs.businessContext: Density at operating temperature. Water = 1000, oil ≈ 850.

businessContext_i18n.en: Density at operating temperature. Water = 1000, oil ≈ 850.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse volumique à la température de fonctionnement. Eau = 1000, huile ≈ 850.
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad a temperatura de operación. Agua = 1000, aceite ≈ 850.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الكثافة عند درجة حرارة التشغيل. الماء = 1000، الزيت ≈ 850.

inputs.label: Dynamic Viscosity
inputs.businessContext: Dynamic viscosity at operating temperature. Water = 0.001, heavy oil up to 1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Dynamic viscosity at operating temperature. Water = 0.001, heavy oil up to 1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşletme sıcaklığındaki dinamik viskozite. Su = 0.001, ağır yağ 1'e kadar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dynamische Viskosität bei Betriebstemperatur. Wasser = 0,001, Schweröl bis zu 1.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Viscosité dynamique à la température de fonctionnement. Eau = 0,001, huile lourde jusqu'à 1.
businessContext_i18n.es: Viscosidad dinámica a temperatura de operación. Agua = 0.001, aceite pesado hasta 1.
businessContext_i18n.ar: اللزوجة الديناميكية عند درجة حرارة التشغيل. الماء = 0.001، الزيت الثقيل حتى 1.

inputs.label: Pipe Roughness
inputs.businessContext: Absolute roughness height. Steel = 0.000045, concrete = 0.001. Per ISO 9906.

businessContext_i18n.en: Absolute roughness height. Steel = 0.000045, concrete = 0.001. Per ISO 9906.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mutlak pürüzlülük yüksekliği. Çelik = 0.000045, beton = 0.001. ISO 9906'ya göre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Absolute Rauheitshöhe. Stahl = 0,000045, Beton = 0,001. Gemäß ISO 9906.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur de rugosité absolue. Acier = 0,000045, béton = 0,001. Selon ISO 9906.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura de rugosidad absoluta. Acero = 0.000045, hormigón = 0.001. Según ISO 9906.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ارتفاع الخشونة المطلق. الفولاذ = 0.000045، الخرسانة = 0.001. وفقًا لـ ISO 9906.

inputs.label: Elevation Change
inputs.businessContext: Positive if outlet is higher than inlet. Affects gravitational head.

businessContext_i18n.en: Positive if outlet is higher than inlet. Affects gravitational head.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıkış girişten yüksekse pozitif. Yerçekimi yükünü etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Positiv, wenn der Auslass höher als der Einlass liegt. Beeinflusst die geodätische Förderhöhe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Positif si la sortie est plus haute que l'entrée. Affecte la hauteur gravitationnelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Positivo si la salida está más alta que la entrada. Afecta la altura gravitacional.
businessContext_i18n.ar: موجب إذا كان المخرج أعلى من المدخل. يؤثر على الضغط الجاذبي.

inputs.label: Minor Loss Coefficient (K)
inputs.businessContext: Sum of K factors for fittings, valves, bends. Per Crane Technical Paper No. 410.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of K factors for fittings, valves, bends. Per Crane Technical Paper No. 410.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bağlantı parçaları, vanalar, dirsekler için K faktörlerinin toplamı. Crane Teknik Rapor No. 410'a göre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Summe der K-Faktoren für Formstücke, Ventile, Bögen. Gemäß Crane Technical Paper No. 410.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme des facteurs K pour raccords, vannes, coudes. Selon Crane Technical Paper No. 410.
businessContext_i18n.es: Suma de factores K para accesorios, válvulas, codos. Según Crane Technical Paper No. 410.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مجموع عوامل K للوصلات والصمامات والانحناءات. وفقًا لـ Crane Technical Paper No. 410.

rules.message: Flow rate, diameter, and viscosity must be positive to compute Reynolds number.
Relative roughness exceeds 0.05; Colebrook equation may be inaccurate. Consider using Moody chart directly.
Velocity exceeds 10 m/s; risk of erosion and water hammer. Consider larger diameter.

thresholds.message: Pressure drop exceeds 5 bar. Verify pump head capacity and pipe rating.
Fully turbulent flow with high roughness; friction factor may be sensitive to small changes in roughness.
Flow is laminar but flow rate is relatively high. Verify viscosity measurement.

formulas.result: pipe_diameter * pipe_length * (flow_rate / 100) * fluid_density * (fluid_viscosity * roughness * elevation_change * minor_loss_coefficient)

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
